privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating exactly six pages with specific titles: 'Digital Archives', 'Public Collections', 'Restricted Manuscripts', 'Oral History Recordings', 'Photographic Archives', and 'Research Access Policy'. Three of these pages ('Restricted Manuscripts', 'Oral History Recordings', 'Photographic Archives') must be password-protected with the passwords 'manuscripts2024', 'oralhistory2024', and 'photos2024' respectively. All created pages must have a minimum content length of 100 characters. These are explicit instructions matched exactly by the evaluation scripts.
